---
title: Lab Members
listing:
    - id: lab-members
      template: ../_assets/listing-templates/lab-members.ejs
      sort: false
      contents:
          - "pi/james-doss-gollin.qmd"
          - "grad-students/yuchen-lu.qmd"
          - "grad-students/dongwook-kim.qmd"
          - "grad-students-coadvised/kelsey-murphy.qmd"
          - "grad-students-coadvised/true-furrh.qmd"

    - id: alumni
      contents: "alumni/*.qmd"
      template: ../_assets/listing-templates/alumni.ejs
      sort: [ended desc, sortby]
      fields: [title, position, started, ended]
---

::: {#lab-members}
:::

## Alumni

::: {#alumni}
:::
